name: Green Beans Amadine ( MW )
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green beans in a small nonmetal bowl.
2. Sprinkle with water.
3. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 3 to 4 minutes or just until tender. Let stand, covered, while preparing the butter mixture.
4. For the butter mixture, melt the butter or margarine uncovered on 100% power for 20 to 30 seconds until melted.
5. Stir in toasted almonds and lemon juice.
6. Drain the green beans; spoon the butter mixture over the green beans.
